name: Straightforward installation appointment reschedule
description: A cooperative homeowner needs to move an upcoming installation appointment from Tuesday afternoon to Thursday morning and can provide all identifying details when asked.
expectedMilestones: Confirm the customer wants to reschedule an installation appointment
Collect or confirm key identifying details such as name, address, and current appointment window
Offer or confirm an acceptable replacement time window
Restate the updated appointment details clearly
Close the interaction with a concise confirmation
